questions.question: Describe the key features of the Chalk and Talk method in relation to teaching Metric Spaces. Explain how this method can be used to facilitate learning.
questions.hint: Provide a clear explanation of the method's strengths and weaknesses

questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of using PowerPoint Presentations in teaching Metric Spaces, compared to the Chalk and Talk method?
questions.hint: Consider the benefits and drawbacks of each approach

questions.question: Design a 10-minute lecture on the basics of Metric Spaces using the Chalk and Talk method. How will you engage students and promote active learning?
questions.hint: Include details on how to manage class time and encourage participation
